summary: Contract is structurally sound and faithfully realizes the approved design brief. The 19-step plan covers signature shrink, TTY guard with NO_STDIN code, Windows EAGAIN/EOF normalization, BOM stripping, JSON line-hint parsing, output.ts helper extension, 10-subcommand option cleanup, evidence/task-record add three-way fallback, preservation of event/context/packet value flags, integration.js rewrite (~17 sites), and new input.test.ts covering all six named cases. edge_cases catches non-obvious Windows errno -4095 and isTTY=undefined paths. demo_steps (AC1..AC12) map 1:1 to acceptance_criteria. Boundaries are clean: readInputData stays 0-arg pure; opts.data/opts.file fallback lives in call sites via try/catch rather than leaking back into input.ts signature — correct separation of concerns.
concerns: Bundle regeneration (npm run bundle) is a hard requirement in the design-brief but is absent from planned_actions. contract.json eval_commands only run build+test. Worker must add 'cd src/cli && npm run build && npm run bundle' and cross-grep plugin/bin/geas (current baseline 15 --data/--file JSON declarations -> expected 2-3 non-JSON) before claiming AC12. Not a structural blocker but must not be skipped at self-review.

Merge semantics for stdin-base + --set overlay is declared 'shallow per parseSetFlags keys'. Acceptable for current schemas but worker should add an inline comment at evidence/task-record add call sites so future reviewers do not mistake it for deep merge.

NO_STDIN helper placement in output.ts is left as worker choice (new export vs fileError code-param). Prefer a dedicated noStdinError() to keep fileError focused on filesystem errors and avoid overloading FILE_ERROR semantics.

Invalid-JSON line computation by scanning raw[0..position] is V8-message-format-dependent. Test (d) should also cover the graceful fallback where SyntaxError.message regex fails, surfacing the raw message instead of crashing — prevents future V8 upgrades silently breaking hints.
